mechanics.excerpt: Ives Compact: The official language of the Capellan Confederation is Mandarin though English widely spoken: Sian The Capellan capital is famed for its vast Oak, pine and bamboo forests_ in which leopards and giant pandas roam: The early colonists introduced most of the planet' wildlife and care fully nurtured its ecosystem resemble Terra' Asian conti" nent, home of the Liao family that became Sian'$ rulers_ In the centuries since colonization; however; increasingly profitable mining operations have devastated many wilderness areas.
